action.reasoning: Observation: New best 0.6361 with fixed 2-model ensemble (best.pt + clip_best.pt). Per-class: squirrel(0.22) and bobcat(0.39) are weakest. ~10 min left. Analysis: Adding clip_best_ema.pt (EMA version of CLIP) could improve generalization since EMA models tend to have smoother decision boundaries. Also try best_3.pt (iter5 DINOv2 EMA, val=0.8496). Decision: Write predict.py with 4-model ensemble (best.pt + best_3.pt + clip_best.pt + clip_best_ema.pt), equal weights, submit eval immediately.
